project_name: SALCHIMAX - Urban Fast Food Landing Page

design_philosophy.description: A high-contrast, adrenaline-fueled interface that mimics the feeling of finding a glowing food truck at 2 AM. Dark backgrounds, neon orange accents, and aggressive typography.

scale.h1: text-6xl md:text-8xl lg:text-9xl uppercase tracking-tighter leading-none

buttons.primary: bg-[#FF6600] text-white hover:bg-[#FF8533] rounded-none uppercase font-bold tracking-widest px-8 py-4 transition-all duration-300 hover:shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(255,102,0,0.4)] clip-path-polygon-[0_0,100%_0,100%_85%,95%_100%,0_100%]
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-[#FF6600] text-[#FF6600] hover:bg-[#FF6600] hover:text-white rounded-none uppercase font-bold tracking-widest px-8 py-4 transition-all duration-300
buttons.whatsapp_float: fixed bottom-6 right-6 z-50 bg-[#25D366] text-white p-4 rounded-full shadow-2xl hover:scale-110 transition-transform duration-300 animate-pulse

cards.menu_item: bg-[#171717] border border-white/5 hover:border-[#FF6600]/50 transition-colors duration-300 overflow-hidden group relative
cards.feature: bg-[#121212] p-8 border border-white/5 text-center hover:bg-[#1A1A1A] transition-colors duration-300

nav.wrapper: fixed top-0 left-0 w-full z-40 bg-[#0D0D0D]/80 backdrop-blur-md border-b border-white/5
nav.link: text-sm uppercase tracking-widest hover:text-[#FF6600] transition-colors duration-200

layout_strategies.hero: Full screen height. Background image with heavy dark overlay. Big center/left typography. Floating elements.
layout_strategies.menu_grid: Bento Grid style. Mix of large featured items and smaller list items.
layout_strategies.footer: Massive typography footer. 'SALCHIMAX' spanning full width.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install dependencies: `npm install framer-motion lucide-react react-fast-marquee clsx tailwind-merge`
Ensure 'Bebas Neue' is loaded in `index.html` or `index.css`.
Use the specific orange hex #FF6600 for all primary actions.
Implement a sticky 'Order on WhatsApp' button that is visible on mobile at all times.
Create a 'grain' overlay texture using CSS `before` pseudo-element on the body to give it that gritty urban feel.
The 'Why Us' section should use the neon sign images as background or accent elements.
Footer should be HUGE. The brand name 'SALCHIMAX' should take up 50% of the viewport height in the footer.
universal_guidelines: Do not use gradients for text, keep it stark white for readability.
Use 2x padding for sections (py-24 or py-32).
All interactive elements must have `data-testid` attributes.
